_meta.sae_arch: dense ReLU, no top-k, no pre-bias; state-dict keys encoder_linear.{weight,bias} / decoder_linear.{weight,bias}; steering direction for feature i = decoder_linear.weight[:, i]
_meta.hook: residual stream after decoder layer 50 of meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct (model.layers.50 output), d_model 8192, dict 65536, L0 121, trained on LMSYS-Chat-1M (toxic latents zeroed)
_meta.lens: neuronpedia/jacobian-lens llama3.3-70b-it (10.6 GB, fit on wikitext-103, early-stopped at 125 prompts, 2026-06-16)
_meta.labels_source: target labels validated in TJ's clean-room activation study (praxagent.ai/blog/posts/how-to-read-an-sae-feature-id); control labels to be pulled from Neuronpedia slug llama3.3-70b-it-gf / 50-resid-post-gf BEFORE the run and frozen here
_meta.controls: index-adjacent = ids +/-3 of each target (same SAE, unrelated concept — the blog post's own control discipline); plus 12 random same-layer features drawn with seed 0, excluding targets and adjacents

_probe_note: single-token status checked per tokenizer at runtime; misses logged. This token set is FROZEN at pre-registration; readout metrics report both this set and full-vocab top-k shifts so the set choice cannot cherry-pick.
